verdict: sin^2 theta_W = 3/8 is the standard SU(5)/SO(10) GUT value (TFPT inherits it via the carrier 16). Running the measured SM couplings 1-loop: alpha1=alpha2 meet at Lambda~1.0e+13 GeV but alpha3 misses by 13% (the known SM non-unification). Imposing unification, the 3/8 boundary predicts sin^2 theta_W(M_Z)=0.2076 vs measured 0.23122 -- the classic ~10% GQW gap. CONSISTENT at GUT level, NOT a precision hit; closing the gap needs SUSY/thresholds (beyond TFPT's tree relation).
